feed.title: SSVM 2027
feed.subtitle: 11th International Conference on Scale Space and Variational Methods in Computer Vision, held in 2027 in Veldhoven, the Netherlands. The conference serves as a primary forum for researchers at the intersection of continuous mathematics and computer vision. The core focus is on the mathematical formulation of imaging problems using continuous-domain modeling, including but not limited to: variational methods, geometry, PDEs, machine learning etc.
